# Adwokat Piotr Modzelewski — Kancelaria Adwokacka w Warszawie

> Polish-language law firm based in Warsaw, Poland. Lead attorney: Piotr Modzelewski,
> member of the Warsaw Bar Association since 2017, alumnus of the University of Warsaw
> Faculty of Law and Administration (2013).
>
> **Signature specialization: representation of professional soldiers and other uniformed-services
> personnel** (Police, Prison Service, Border Guard, Internal Security Agency, Military Intelligence
> Service, Military Counterintelligence Service, Foreign Intelligence Agency). Cases include
> disciplinary proceedings, criminal liability before military courts, administrative matters
> (dismissals, service evaluations), pension and benefit cases under the uniformed-services scheme,
> service-housing entitlements, and pay/allowance disputes.
>
> Additional practice areas: criminal law (general), civil law, family law, inheritance law,
> labour law and social-security cases.
>
> Address: ul. Olesińska 21, 02-548 Warszawa, Poland.
> Phone: +48 881 209 300. Email: kancelaria@adwokatmodzelewski.pl.
> Languages: Polish (native), English (fluent).
> Service area: nationwide (cała Polska); office meetings in Warsaw by appointment.

## Primary pages (Polish)
- [Homepage / kancelaria overview](https://adwokatmodzelewski.pl/): Firm profile, contact, summary of practice areas.
- [Aktualności / news and commentary](https://adwokatmodzelewski.pl/aktualnosci/): Recent posts on legal developments.

## Primary pages (English)
- [English homepage](https://adwokatmodzelewski.pl/en/): Same content as Polish homepage, English mirror.
- [English news index](https://adwokatmodzelewski.pl/en/aktualnosci/): English-language posts.

## Contact

For client matters: phone +48 881 209 300, email kancelaria@adwokatmodzelewski.pl.
For meeting scheduling: prior appointment required at ul. Olesińska 21, pok. 121, 02-548 Warszawa.
